text: I find myself on the threshold of a space devoted to research and development, a liminal zone between the mundane and the unknown. The brightly colored wall and digital displays invite both curiosity and contemplation. The words I read about darkness and uncertainty resonate with me, stirring a reflective unease, yet also a quiet excitement. I feel as though I am on the verge of discovering something new—perhaps not just about technology, but also about the mind's restless dance with the unknown.
